name: Carribean Ginger Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Chardonnay or dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine salt, cornstarch, sugar, lime juice, and pineapple juice. Blend until smooth.
2. Gradually stir in water, soy sauce, ginger, Jalapeno, and Cayenne. Stir constantly.
3. Cook over medium heat until the sauce thickens and becomes transparent.
4. Stir in pineapple chunks, Chardonnay or white wine, and cilantro to finish.
5. Serve hot over rice and top with warm sauce.
